programme.desc: Titans QB Marcus Mariota leads a second-half comeback to stun the Kansas City Chiefs at home in the 2017 AFC Wild Card Game.

programme.title: NFL Game Re-Airs
programme.desc: Relive the Week 3, 2018 matchup between the New York Jets and the Cleveland Browns, as Cleveland won 21-17 on Thursday night for their first win since Dec. 24, 2016.

programme.title: NFL Game Re-Airs
programme.desc: Kyler Murray threw two touchdown passes to Antoine Wesley and the Arizona Cardinals hold on to beat the Dallas Cowboys 25-22 in a matchup of playoff-bound teams.

programme.title: NFL Game Re-Airs
programme.desc: Lions spoil Chiefs' celebration of Super Bowl title by rallying for a 21-20 win in the NFL's opener.

programme.title: NFL Game Re-Airs

programme.title: NFL Game Re-Airs
programme.desc: LaDainian Tomlinson scored three touchdowns Sunday to break the NFL single-season record with 29 TDs and help the Chargers beat the Broncos 48-20 to clinch the AFC West title.

programme.title: NFL Game Re-Airs
programme.desc: The Seattle Seahawks pull off the upset over the rival Oakland Raiders thanks to an all-time rushing performance from Shaun Alexander with 35 rushes for 266 yards and 3 touchdowns.

programme.title: Golfer's Guide - Swing Sequencing
programme.desc: Nathalie Sheehan is helping you add distance and hit more fairways with the driver by improving your sequence. Start at address, take the club back to the top, bring it down through impact and into the finish learning the biggest keys and drills.

programme.title: Golfer's Guide - Swing Sequencing
programme.desc: Nathalie Sheehan is helping you hit more greens and make more powerful contact with the irons by improving your sequence. Start at address, take the club back to the top, bring it down through impact and into the finish.

programme.title: Playing Lessons
programme.desc: 2020 AIG Women's Open champion Sophia Popov shares her tips and strategies that led to her major victory. Sophia gives insights on how to hit accurate approach shots when in between yardages. She also goes in depth on her putting process.

programme.title: Playing Lessons
programme.desc: The 2021 Chevron Championship champion Patty Tavatanakit joins Bones to share the tips and strategies that led to her major victory. Patty gives insights on how to maximize margin of error when hitting approach shots to difficult pin placements.

programme.title: Playing Lessons
programme.desc: LPGA standout Jaye Marie Green joins Bones on the course and shares her tips and strategies that have led to her impressive professional career. Lessons include a break-down of her lag putting process, how to hit it high over the trouble, and more.

programme.title: Playing Lessons
programme.desc: Sean Foley plays alongside LPGA Tour star Pernilla Lindberg to discuss her strategies and techniques that work for her on the big stage.

programme.title: Playing Lessons
programme.desc: Sean Foley plays alongside Shubhankar Sharma to discover strategies and techniques that work for him on the big stage, and to show viewers what they can incorporate on their home courses.

Accident Man
programme.desc: Mike Fallon is a seasoned hit man who is known for making his target's death look like an accident. When Fallon's girlfriend turns up dead, he goes after his old colleagues to find the one responsible.

programme.title: Accident Man: Hitman's Holiday
programme.desc: A hit man must beat the top assassins in the world to protect the ungrateful son of a mafia boss, save the life of his only friend, and rekindle his relationship with his maniacal father figure.

programme.title: Machete Kills
programme.desc: The president recruits ex-Federale Machete to take down an eccentric arms dealer who plans to spread war and anarchy throughout the world.

Officer Mike Chandler and a young civilian passenger find themselves unprepared and outgunned when fate puts them squarely in-the-crosshairs of a daring bank heist that is being carried out by a fearless team of highly trained and heavily armed men.

programme.title: Primal
programme.desc: Hunter and collector Frank Walsh sails to America with a priceless white jaguar and a dangerous political assassin. When the prisoner manages to break free, Walsh must utilize his expert skills to capture the dangerous killer -- not dead, but alive.

programme.title: The Vatican Tapes
programme.desc: The fate of the world hangs in the balance when a cleric (Peter Andersson) battles an ancient satanic force for a young woman's (Olivia Taylor Dudley) soul.

programme.title: Punisher: War Zone
programme.desc: Frank Castle, known as the Punisher, ruthlessly demolishes organized crime, but it starts an even bigger war.

programme.title: The Boondock Saints
programme.desc: Two brothers (Sean Patrick Flanery, Norman Reedus), believing themselves to be on a mission from God, begin killing members of Boston's underworld.

programme.title: Rebel Without a Crew
programme.desc: Josh feels the pressure of first-time filmmaking as actors fail to stick to their script, and decisions pertaining to technical scenes and paying his actors weigh on his conscience.

programme.title: The Delta Force
programme.desc: Terrorists reroute a passenger jet from Athens to Beirut, where commandos (Chuck Norris, Lee Marvin) are waiting to negotiate.

programme.title: Blow Out
programme.desc: A sound man (John Travolta) re-creates a political murder-by-car-crash with a sight-and-sound montage.

programme.title: A Force of One
programme.desc: A veteran (Chuck Norris) teaches martial arts to a California detective (Jennifer O'Neill) and her colleagues, and joins them on a case.

programme.title: BloodRayne
programme.desc: A vampire hybrid joins the fight against the evil bloodsucker who sired her.

programme.title: BloodRayne 2: Deliverance
programme.desc: Beautiful Rayne (Natassia Malthe) teams with demon hunters to save a Western town from a gang of vampiric cowboys led by Billy the Kid (Zack Ward).

programme.title: BloodRayne: The Third Reich
programme.desc: Half-vampire, half-human Rayne must stop a Nazi official and his army of walking dead before they can carry out their plan to make Hitler immortal.

programme.title: Ip Man
programme.desc: The life story of Yip Man, the first person to teach the Chinese martial art of Wing Chun.

programme.title: Master Z: Ip Man Legacy
